name: Customer ID Injector
description: Forces customer-memory tool calls (mem0 + wiki person pages) to use the actual LINE senderId derived from the session key, removing the prompt-layer reliance on the LLM passing the correct user_id.

memToolPrefix.description: Prefix that identifies mem0 MCP tools whose user_id should be overridden.

wikiToolNames.description: Wiki tools that take an entity-pointing argument we should rewrite (e.g. wiki_get, wiki_apply). The argument named in `wikiPathField` is rewritten to the canonical customer entity path.

wikiPathField.description: Field name in wiki tool params that we treat as the entity path/id to rewrite.

wikiCustomerPathTemplate.description: Path template for the per-customer wiki entity page. {userId} is replaced with the canonical LINE userId.

logOverrides.description: Log every override decision via runtime.log for debugging.

channels.description: Restrict override to specific channels. Default: ["line"]. Empty array = all channels.
